# Rentier Digital

> Phil is a French developer, SEO automation consultant, SaaS builder, and content creator.
> This site covers AI automation, n8n workflows, content monetization, and indie SaaS development.
> Published in EN, FR, DE and ES.

## Expertise
- AI-powered content workflows
- Self-hosted automation (n8n, Docker, Traefik)
- SEO strategy and programmatic content
- Claude Code and agentic AI development
- Medium Partner Program monetization
- Indie SaaS building (Next.js, Convex, Supabase)

## Book
"Prompt Contracts" - A framework to stop vibe coding and start shipping.
Applies software engineering discipline to AI prompt design: structured, explicit instructions
that give LLMs the context they need to solve the right problem, not just generate plausible code.
